name: Help Center
description: Knowledge-base categories, support articles, and FAQ discovery.
author: Buyzilo

release.notes: Public support content and knowledge-base package.

hooks.name: support.request.before_submit
hooks.description: Suggests help-center articles before opening support tickets.

hooks.name: storefront.route.help_center
hooks.description: Owns the public help-center landing and article route family.

dataGovernance.retentionNote: Knowledge-base configuration is exportable and removable, but published support articles should be reviewed before cleanup.

screenshots.caption: Knowledge-base categories and article publishing workflow

prerequisites.description: Set the public support contact before opening the knowledge-base to buyers.

tasks.label: Seed help center runtime flag
tasks.description: Marks help-center runtime availability for support-routing safeguards.

tasks.description: Creates the addon runtime cache directory for knowledge-base exports.

migrations.description: Seed help center discovery defaults for support-page article suggestions.

extensionMigrations.notes: Align help discovery routes and dashboard widget naming with the knowledge-base rollout.

tasks.label: Clear help center runtime flag
tasks.description: Removes the runtime marker when the help-center package is uninstalled.
